name: cramer_rao_bound_classical
divergence_log: Classical CRB uses real-valued Fisher information on a single commuting parameter. Nonclassical quantum CRB requires SLD operators, noncommuting observables, and a Helstrom bound; this baseline discards the noncommuting-estimator structure.

numpy.reason: Monte Carlo variance and Fisher eval

pytorch.reason: imported as supportive dependency; not load-bearing for classical CRB

z3.reason: no SMT proof claim for this baseline
